name: sklearn-to-ts
description: Train sklearn models (MLP, Random Forest, Linear Regression), export weights to JSON, and generate pure TypeScript inference code with zero npm dependencies. Handles the full pipeline: feature engineering, synthetic data generation, model training, weight export, and TypeScript codegen. Runs server-side or client-side in <1ms. Use cases include prediction models for fitness (race times, VO2max, recovery), SaaS (churn, lead scoring), e-commerce (pricing, delivery estimates), and more.
